config.comment: Light Protocol v0.13.1 uses SHARED public state trees on devnet — no need to allocate own CMT. These pubkeys come from defaultTestStateTreeAccounts() in @lightprotocol/stateless.js. Pre-mainnet, this is the right path; production-grade DPO2U mainnet may want dedicated trees (~1 SOL one-time alloc).

notes: Shared trees são populadas por outros DApps Solana — DPO2U leaves serão indexed pelo Photon junto com leaves de outros programas.
Pra DPO2U distinguir suas leaves: DPO2U_LEAF_DISCRIMINATOR = 'DPO2ULF1' (8 bytes ASCII) gravado em leaf.discriminator.
Photon getCompressedAccount(leafHash) retorna apenas a leaf específica — multi-tenancy não compromete privacy.
Pre-mainnet decision: avaliar custo de tree dedicada (~1 SOL alloc + ongoing Forester fees) vs shared (free, mas dependência de Light Foundation operating publicly).
